rationale: The cited paper appears as a single methodological example when the authors discuss how, with richer data, they could model spend heterogeneity using the gamma-gamma approach. In this paper, they explicitly do not implement that approach and instead use a simpler ARPO time-series model because public disclosures are too limited. The citation is therefore a contextual reference to prior modeling options, not a core building block of the proposed CBCV framework.
